name: @finch.app/office-suite
description: Office document skills and Composer shortcuts for Finch.

finch.name: Office Suite
finch.description: Create, edit, analyze, and convert Word, PDF, PowerPoint, and Excel files with bundled document skills.
finch.systemPrompt: When the user asks to create, read, edit, analyze, convert, or otherwise process .docx, .pdf, .pptx, .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv files, use the matching bundled Office Suite skill. Use the Office Suite Composer action to help the user start a file task.
